message:
test(proptest): expand scrollback_eviction (12→28), undo (12→19), search_explain (13→21) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

scrollback_eviction: add serde roundtrips for ImportanceScoringConfig,
ScrollbackLine, ImportanceBudgetReport, EvictionTarget, EvictionPlan,
EvictionReport; add validate/default/is_empty/empty-store properties

undo: add invalid variant rejection, pretty serde, JSON field presence,
all-Some optionals, actor/reason last-wins, builder independence

search_explain: add PANE_EXCLUDED, FTS_INDEX_INCONSISTENT, STALE_PANES,
NARROW_TIME_RANGE property tests; add suggestions/evidence/JSON field checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
